title: Chris McConnell
text: Home * People * Chris McConnell Christopher C. McConnell , an American computer scientist and Microsoft employee, alumnus from the Carnegie Mellon University . At CMU as P.D. Student, Chris McConnell worked with Berliner on the chess program HiTech [1] , and was involved in researching the B* probability based search and in tuning evaluation .
